name: Critical Strike
description: 20% chance to deal double damage on each hit.

name: Stun Blow
description: Melee hits have a 25% chance to stun the target for 0.8 seconds.

name: Multishot
description: Ranged attacks fire one additional projectile.

name: Evasion
description: 15% chance to fully dodge an incoming attack.

name: Lifesteal
description: Heals for 20% of damage dealt on each hit.

name: AOE Strike
description: Attacks deal 50% splash damage to all enemies within 40px.

name: Shield Bash
description: The first hit each battle staggers the target for 1.2 seconds.
